# claude_federation_issuer (Resource)

A Workload Identity Federation issuer (`fdis_...`): an external OIDC identity provider that Anthropic trusts for the RFC 7523 jwt-bearer grant.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# GitHub Actions, with JWKS discovery (the default).
resource "claude_federation_issuer" "github_actions" {
  name       = "github-actions"
  issuer_url = "https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com"
}

# An issuer that serves its keys from a fixed JWKS endpoint.
resource "claude_federation_issuer" "internal" {
  name       = "internal-idp"
  issuer_url = "https://idp.example.com"
  jwks_type  = "explicit_url"
  jwks_url   = "https://idp.example.com/keys"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `issuer_url` (String) The `iss` claim value incoming JWTs must match exactly, e.g. `https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com`.
- `name` (String) Slug identifier. Must match `^[a-z0-9-]+$`, be 1 to 255 characters, and be unique within the organization.

### Optional

- `check_jti` (Boolean) Whether the jwt-bearer exchange enforces JTI single-use (replay protection) for tokens from this issuer. Defaults to `true`.
- `jwks_ca_cert_pem` (String) Optional custom CA (PEM) for TLS verification of the JWKS fetch. Only for `discovery` and `explicit_url`.
- `jwks_discovery_base` (String) Discovery base URL, set when it differs from `issuer_url`. Only for `jwks_type` `discovery`.
- `jwks_inline_keys` (String) A JSON array of JWK objects. Required when `jwks_type` is `inline`.
- `jwks_type` (String) How signing keys are obtained: `discovery` (OIDC discovery, the default), `explicit_url` (a fixed JWKS endpoint), or `inline` (a static key set).
- `jwks_url` (String) JWKS endpoint URL. Required when `jwks_type` is `explicit_url`.
- `max_jwt_lifetime_seconds` (Number) Maximum allowed iat→exp spread for assertions from this issuer (1-176400 seconds). Defaults to 3600.

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the issuer was archived, if archived.
- `created_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the issuer was created.
- `id` (String) Identifier of the federation issuer (`fdis_...`).
- `type` (String) Object type, always `federation_issuer`.
- `updated_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the issuer was last updated.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Federation issuers can be imported by their fdis_ identifier.
terraform import claude_federation_issuer.github_actions fdis_0123456789abcdef
```
